source: from pyspark.sql import functions as F

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

df_named = df.select(
    F.col("ID").alias("case_id"),

    F.col("1").alias("site_id"),
    F.col("2").alias("site_address_line1"),
    F.col("3").alias("site_address_line2"),
    F.col("4").alias("site_town"),
    F.col("5").alias("site_county"),
    F.col("6").alias("site_postcode"),
    F.col("7").alias("site_country"),

    F.col("10").alias("land_use"),
    F.col("11").alias("site_viewable_from_road"),
    F.col("12").alias("inspector_need_to_enter_site"),
    F.col("13").alias("number_of_residences"),
    F.col("14").alias("site_area_hectares"),
    F.col("15").alias("floor_space_sqm"),
    F.col("16").alias("listed_building_grade"),
    F.col("17").alias("affects_setting_of_listed_building"),
    F.col("18").alias("within_green_belt"),
    F.col("19").alias("within_aonb"),
    F.col("20").alias("within_sssi"),
    F.col("21").alias("historic_building_grant_made"),
    F.col("22").alias("in_or_relates_to_conservation_area"),
    F.col("23").alias("flooding_issue"),
    F.col("24").alias("attribute_24_unknown"),
    F.col("25").alias("agricultural_holding"),
    F.col("26").alias("grid_reference_easting"),
    F.col("27").alias("grid_reference_northing"),
    F.col("28").alias("land_use_category"),
    F.col("29").alias("common_or_village_green_name")
)

display(df_named.limit(20))

server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-dev.database.windows.net"
database = "pins-sqldb-peas-dev"

url = (
    f"jdbc:sqlserver://{server}:1433;"
    f"database={database};"
    "encrypt=true;"
    "trustServerCertificate=false;"
    "hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net;"
    "loginTimeout=30;"
)

user = "peas_app_ZXzkE0vP"

# Pull password from Key Vault
# Replace YOUR_KEY_VAULT_NAME and secret name with your actual values
password = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret("pinskvsynwodwdevuks", "mpesc-sql-password")

cases_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_df = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .load(cases_path)
)

# Rename column to match df_named
cases_df = cases_df.select(
    F.col("Case ID").cast("string").alias("case_id")
)

df_filtered = df_named.join(
    cases_df,
    on="case_id",
    how="inner"
)

display(df_filtered)
